title: CUTracer TMA Access Trace Record
description: Schema for MSG_TYPE_TMA_ACCESS (type='tma_trace') - records TMA (Tensor Memory Accelerator) descriptor / transfer info for UTMALDG/UTMASTG/UTMAREDG etc. Two writer variants are accepted: the current writer emits tma_param_size + tma_transfer_info (+ desc_addr), while older traces emit desc_addr + desc_raw. Only the common fields are required; the descriptor fields are version-dependent and optional.

ctx.description: CUDA context pointer in hex format

sass.description: SASS instruction string (injected by the Python TraceReader on read; not present in raw NDJSON)

trace_index.description: Sequential index of this trace record

cta.description: CTA (Cooperative Thread Array) coordinates [x, y, z]

pc.description: Instruction byte offset within the kernel function (hex). This is not an absolute virtual address; combine with func_addr from kernel_metadata to get the runtime address.

desc_addr.description: Stable per-tensor key (hex): the parsed global tensor address (tiled) or raw bulk-copy source address. Used by downstream analyzers for dedup.

desc_raw.description: Legacy 16-qword raw TMA descriptor blob. Each qword is a hex string ("0x...") or integer. Emitted by older traces only; the current writer prefers the structured tma_transfer_info field. decode_tma_descriptor() accepts both forms.

tma_param_size.description: Size in bytes of the captured TMA parameter handle (always emitted by the current writer).

tma_transfer_info.description: NVBit 1.8+ structured TMA transfer info parsed by nvbit_parse_tma_transfer_info (is_bulk/is_tensor, src/dst memory spaces and shared-memory data/mbarrier addresses, tiled tensor map). Present only when the handle parsed successfully. Nested structure is version-dependent and intentionally not constrained here.
